name: We One Aviation
cta_text: DM We One Aviation today and start your DGCA journey with mentors who fly with you.
voice: Bright, simple, psychologically engaging. Speaks to Indian aspiring pilots and DGCA aspirants with warmth and authority. No jargon walls, no fluff, no fear-mongering.

visual.style_suffix: clean modern flat illustration, aviation theme, bright, minimal, high contrast, no text, no letters, no words
